ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to DEC-18-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Continued To Oct-16-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Jesus Torres, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to OCT-16-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Continued To Jul-10-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set July 10, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
